daily.today_energy: Mercury's got your back today, Aquarius. You're radiating that magnetic energy that makes people actually want to listen to what you have to say. Trust the vibe you're putting out—it's hitting different.
daily.love: If you're coupled up, today's about those little gestures that actually mean something. Single? Someone's probably noticing your energy from across the room. Keep it real, keep it you.
daily.career: Your ideas are sharper than usual right now. This is the moment to pitch that concept you've been sitting on or speak up in meetings. Your perspective matters more than you think today.
daily.health: Your mind's buzzing with ideas, which is amazing but also remember to ground yourself. Take walks, drink water, maybe journal if thoughts are spiraling. Your nervous system needs gentle care.

weekly.overview: This week's energy is asking you to trust your instincts, Aquarius. Mercury's movement brings clarity to something that's been foggy, and honestly? You're about to see things from a totally fresh angle. Lean into the vibe shift.
weekly.love: Your heart's been quiet lately, but this week it's ready to speak. Whether you're single or coupled up, there's a moment of real vulnerability coming—and it's actually beautiful. Don't overthink the feelings bubbling up.
weekly.career: Projects you've been grinding on are gaining momentum. The energy around your work feels lighter this week, like things are finally clicking into place. Trust the process you've been building; recognition is closer than you think.
weekly.health: Your body's asking for more rest and intentional movement. This isn't about forcing routines—it's about listening to what actually feels good. That activity that makes you happy? Do more of that instead.
